-        old_out = self.classifier.out_features if isinstance(self.classifier, nn.Linear) else 0

+            old_out = 0

+            old_weight = None

+            old_bias = None

-        old_cls = self.classifier

-        new_cls = nn.Linear(self.feature_dim, new_out).to(self.classifier.weight.device)

-        if old_out > 0:

-            new_cls.weight.data[:old_out] = old_cls.weight.data

-            new_cls.bias.data[:old_out] = old_cls.bias.data

+        device = next(self.parameters()).device

+        new_cls = nn.Linear(self.feature_dim, new_out).to(device)

+        if old_out > 0 and old_weight is not None:

+            new_cls.weight.data[:old_out] = old_weight

+            new_cls.bias.data[:old_out] = old_bias

         self.classifier = new_cls

         return old_out
